courses.label: Degree Engineering
courses.description: First-year engineering admissions, branch exploration, rank-based closure review, and institute-level option planning.
courses.counselingFocus: Strongest data coverage with rank-wise closure and intake reports.

courses.label: Degree / Diploma Pharmacy
courses.description: Degree and diploma pharmacy admission guidance with official timelines, first-round closure analysis, and reporting support.
courses.counselingFocus: Official round analysis is available; recommendations stay source-backed where closure data is present.

courses.label: DDCET
courses.description: DDCET engineering and pharmacy exam support with current key dates, instructions, and next-step guidance.
courses.counselingFocus: Exam and process guidance first; recommendation depth depends on official closure records exposed on the portal.

courses.label: Diploma to Degree
courses.description: Lateral-entry engineering and pharmacy counseling with closure, vacant seat, and confirmation guidance.
courses.counselingFocus: Round-based closure and vacant seat documents available for grounded lateral-entry suggestions.

courses.label: ME / M.Tech
courses.description: Postgraduate engineering admission support with source monitoring for updates and official process navigation.
courses.counselingFocus: Structured support is available, but recommendation depth depends on active official publications.

courses.label: M.Pharm
courses.description: M.Pharm admissions with vacant-seat updates, closure tracking, and institute-level opportunity review.
courses.counselingFocus: Grounded seat and closure coverage from recent official vacant-seat rounds.

courses.label: MBA / MCA
courses.description: Management and MCA admissions support covering process, scheduling, documentation, and official updates.
courses.counselingFocus: Supports process guidance now; recommendation depth expands as official closure data becomes available.

courses.label: MBA-CoE
courses.description: Council of entrepreneurship MBA process support with official notices and checklist-style next steps.
courses.counselingFocus: Grounded on official instructions first, with advisory support kept clearly separate.

courses.label: B.Arch
courses.description: Architecture admission support with merit, vacancy, allotment, and NATA-oriented guidance.
courses.counselingFocus: Official vacancy and allotment reports enable grounded B.Arch guidance.

courses.label: M.Arch
courses.description: Postgraduate architecture support with historical closure references and source-backed process guidance.
courses.counselingFocus: Uses the latest available official closure records and highlights when the source year differs from the current session.

courses.label: B.Plan
courses.description: Planning admission support covering procedure, eligibility, and source-grounded student checklists.
courses.counselingFocus: Process guidance first; counseling depth increases when official closure data is refreshed.

courses.label: M.Plan
courses.description: Postgraduate planning guidance with historic closure references and current official notices.
courses.counselingFocus: Grounded on the latest published official closure record and current process documents.

courses.label: B.I.D & B.C.T
courses.description: Design and costume technology admission support with official notices, process steps, and verified contacts.
courses.counselingFocus: Official-process support now, with recommendation depth tied to available published records.

sourceDocuments.snippet: ACPC-GUJARAT ADMISSION-2021 Page 1 GENERATION OF COMMON PROFILE FOR ALL C OUR SE S Introduction:  Every aspiring students o f professional courses can generate t h e i r own profiles by submitting common required details and documents before submitting their application for particular course.  The student can upload available documents like School Leaving certificate, Passport size photograph, Category certificates etc.  The profile will be made available for future applications also therefore students will be free from similar activities for multiple time.  Enter mobile number which is easily available for you during entire process. New Candidate Registration : Creation of User I’d: Step 1: Visit to Admission Committee website www. gujacpc.nic.in. Step 2: Click on “New Candidate Registration” Step 3: Enter your name as per qualifying examination in Candidate Name. Step 4: Choose ISD

sourceDocuments.summary: Page 1 of 7 FAQs for Diploma to Degree Common Entrance Test Frequently Asked Questions for DDCET-2026 Q-01 What is the Meaning of DDCET? A-01 DDCET Means Diploma to Degree Common Entrance Test for admission in D to D Eng
sourceDocuments.snippet: Page 1 of 7 FAQs for Diploma to Degree Common Entrance Test Frequently Asked Questions for DDCET-2026 Q-01 What is the Meaning of DDCET? A-01 DDCET Means Diploma to Degree Common Entrance Test for admission in D to D Engineering/Pharmacy Q-02 What is the Need of DDCET Examination? A-02 • It is found that there is huge variation of students applied from the different boards and accordingly allocation of the seats is also varied, as the allocation of seats is based on the prorate of applicants from different boards. Accordingly, it can be summed up that particularly the students passing the diploma from small board are getting lesser in number of seats compared major board, leads students to dissatisfaction or feels they are not given equal chance of admission. • Also, due to a greater number of Boards, distribution of seats and preparation of merit list has become more complicated. sourceDocuments.snippet: કમિશ્નરેટ ઓાેફ ટેકનિકલ ઓેજ્યુકેશિ, ગુજરાત ઓેડ્મિશિ કમિટી ફાેર પ્ ાેફેશિલ કાેર્ષીસ [ ACPC] એલ. ડી. કોલેજ ઓફ એંજીન્યરરંગ કેમ્પસ, નવરંગપુરા, અમદાવાદ - ૩૮૦ ૦૧૫. Awareness Seminars for DDCET - 2026 Diploma to Degree Engineering and Pharmacy Admission રાજ્ય સરકાર દ્વ ારા પ્ર વેશ વર્ષ ૨૦૨૬-૨૭ દરરમયાન રાજ્યની વવવવધ યુવનવવસષટીનાં રડપ્લોમા ઈજનેરી અને રડપ્લોમા ફામષસીનાં વવદ્યાર્થીઓને ડીપ્લોમા ર્થ ી રડગ્રી ઈજનેરી/ફામષસી અભ્યાસક્રમમાં પ્ર વેશ માટે DDCET પરીક્ષાનાં આધારે પ્ર વેશ ફાળવવાનું ઠેરવવામાં આવયું છે. ડીપ્લોમા ર્થ ી રડગ્રી ઈજનેરી/ફામષસીમાં પ્ર વેશ માટે યોજાનાર નવી પ્ર વેશ પરીક્ષા (DDCET)નાં માગષદશષન હેતુ સમગ્ર રાજયમાં રજલ્લા સ્ તરે પ્ર વેશ ઈચ્છુક વવદ્યાર્થીઓ અને તેમના વાલીઓને માગષદશષન આપવા અને ઓનલાઈન પ્ર વેશ પ્ર રક્રયા સંબંવધત માવહતી પૂરી પાડવા માટે, ACPC દ્વ ારા નીચેના સમયપત્રક મુજબ વવવવધ જાગૃવત સેરમનારનું આયોજન કરવામાં આવેલ છે. જે અંતગષત વવદ્યાર્થીઓ અને તેમના વાલીઓને સદર સેરમનારમાં માગષદશષન મ

sourceDocuments.title: 07.04.2026: Notice for Change in Examination Date of DDCET Engineering and DDCET Pharmacy
sourceDocuments.summary: DDCET 2026 Commissionerate of Technical Education Admission Committee for Professional Courses L D College of Engineering Campus, Navrangpura, Ahmedabad Change in Date of Examination New Date for DDCET Engineering is 05.
sourceDocuments.snippet: DDCET 2026 Commissionerate of Technical Education Admission Committee for Professional Courses L D College of Engineering Campus, Navrangpura, Ahmedabad Change in Date of Examination New Date for DDCET Engineering is 05.05.2026. New Date for DDCET Pharmacy is 09.05.2026. As the Local Body Elections of Gujarat state is scheduled on 26 April 2026, it is hereby notified to all DDCET-2026 aspiring candidates that the examination originally scheduled on 26 April 2026 has been rescheduled to 05 May 2026 for DDCET Engineering and 09 May 2026 for DDCET Pharmacy. th th th th Candidates are requested to take note of this change and visit the website of the Committee regularly https://acpc.gujarat.gov.in/ for more information. 079-26566000 08:00 am to 12.00 (Mid Night) Website of the Committee https://acpc.gujarat.gov.in Website for online Process https://gujacpc.admissions.nic.in/ DDCET 2026 પર��ા

sourceDocuments.snippet: ACPC-GUJARAT ADMISSION-2021 Page 1 GENERATION OF COMMON PROFILE FOR ALL C OUR SE S Introduction:  Every aspiring students o f professional courses can generate t h e i r own profiles by submitting common required details and documents before submitting their application for particular course.  The student can upload available documents like School Leaving certificate, Passport size photograph, Category certificates etc.  The profile will be made available for future applications also therefore students will be free from similar activities for multiple time.  Enter mobile number which is easily available for you during entire process. sourceDocuments.snippet: ACPC-GUJARAT ADMISSION-2021 Page 1 GENERATION OF COMMON PROFILE FOR ALL C OUR SE S Introduction:  Every aspiring students o f professional courses can generate t h e i r own profiles by submitting common required details and documents before submitting their application for particular course.  The student can upload available documents like School Leaving certificate, Passport size photograph, Category certificates etc.  The profile will be made available for future applications also therefore students will be free from similar activities for multiple time.  Enter mobile number which is easily available for you during entire process. New Candidate Registration : Creation of User I’d: Step 1: Visit to Admission Committee website www. gujacpc.nic.in. Step 2: Click on “New Candidate Registration” Step 3: Enter your name as per qualifying examination in Candidate Name. Step 4: Choose ISD

sourceDocuments.snippet: ACPC-GUJARAT ADMISSION-2021 Page 1 GENERATION OF COMMON PROFILE FOR ALL C OUR SE S Introduction:  Every aspiring students o f professional courses can generate t h e i r own profiles by submitting common required details and documents before submitting their application for particular course.  The student can upload available documents like School Leaving certificate, Passport size photograph, Category certificates etc.  The profile will be made available for future applications also therefore students will be free from similar activities for multiple time.  Enter mobile number which is easily available for you during entire process. New Candidate Registration : Creation of User I’d: Step 1: Visit to Admission Committee website www. gujacpc.nic.in. Step 2: Click on “New Candidate Registration” Step 3: Enter your name as per qualifying examination in Candidate Name. Step 4: Choose ISD

sourceDocuments.snippet: For 95% seats of total sanctioned intake of Government / Grant-in-aid Institutions; 50% of total sanctioned intake and surrender seats of Management Quota of unaided Institutions; surrendered seats of few COE institutes: A candidate shall have obtained minimum qualifications as per prevailing admission rules from colleges/institutes located in Gujarat State. For 5% seats of total sanctioned intake of Government/Grant-in-Aid Institutions: A candidate shall have obtained minimum Qualifications as per prevailing admission rules from school and college/ institute located outside Gujarat in India. Provision of Merit Mandatory Requirement: The aspiring candidate shall have appeared in CMAT-2025 examination conducted by NTA (prescribed by AICTE) and shall have passed qualifying examination with minimum 50% (45% for SC/ ST/SEBC/EWS categories) for MBA and MCA course. sourceDocuments.snippet: ACPC-GUJARAT ADMISSION-2021 Page 1 GENERATION OF COMMON PROFILE FOR ALL C OUR SE S Introduction:  Every aspiring students o f professional courses can generate t h e i r own profiles by submitting common required details and documents before submitting their application for particular course.  The student can upload available documents like School Leaving certificate, Passport size photograph, Category certificates etc.  The profile will be made available for future applications also therefore students will be free from similar activities for multiple time.  Enter mobile number which is easily available for you during entire process. New Candidate Registration : Creation of User I’d: Step 1: Visit to Admission Committee website www. gujacpc.nic.in. Step 2: Click on “New Candidate Registration” Step 3: Enter your name as per qualifying examination in Candidate Name. Step 4: Choose ISD

sourceDocuments.snippet: For the admission to first year of Master of Architecture (M. Arch) and first year of Master of Planning (M. Plan) in Government, Grant-in-Aid and Self-financed Institutes in Gujarat State, on State Quota of all institutions and Voluntarily surrendered Management quota seats by self-financed institutes, the Government of Gujarat has decided to carry out web based offline admission process for the academic year 2024-25. Eligibility for M.Arch: The candidate shall have passed Bachelor of Architecture degree program from a recognized University/Institution. • The candidate from general category shall have passed above mentioned degree program with minimum 50% aggregate marks (minimum 45% aggregate marks for SC/ST/SEBC/EWSs candidates). sourceDocuments.snippet: ACPC-GUJARAT ADMISSION-2021 Page 1 GENERATION OF COMMON PROFILE FOR ALL C OUR SE S Introduction:  Every aspiring students o f professional courses can generate t h e i r own profiles by submitting common required details and documents before submitting their application for particular course.  The student can upload available documents like School Leaving certificate, Passport size photograph, Category certificates etc.  The profile will be made available for future applications also therefore students will be free from similar activities for multiple time.  Enter mobile number which is easily available for you during entire process. New Candidate Registration : Creation of User I’d: Step 1: Visit to Admission Committee website www. gujacpc.nic.in. Step 2: Click on “New Candidate Registration” Step 3: Enter your name as per qualifying examination in Candidate Name. Step 4: Choose ISD

sourceDocuments.snippet: ACPC-GUJARAT ADMISSION-2021 Page 1 GENERATION OF COMMON PROFILE FOR ALL C OUR SE S Introduction:  Every aspiring students o f professional courses can generate t h e i r own profiles by submitting common required details and documents before submitting their application for particular course.  The student can upload available documents like School Leaving certificate, Passport size photograph, Category certificates etc.  The profile will be made available for future applications also therefore students will be free from similar activities for multiple time.  Enter mobile number which is easily available for you during entire process. New Candidate Registration : Creation of User I’d: Step 1: Visit to Admission Committee website www. gujacpc.nic.in. Step 2: Click on “New Candidate Registration” Step 3: Enter your name as per qualifying examination in Candidate Name. Step 4: Choose ISD
